thesis: Premier private-sector bank compounding book value with superior asset quality and ROA; core anchor of the financials sleeve.
falsification: Asset-quality deterioration (rising slippages/credit cost) or NIM compression that breaks the steady-compounder thesis; sustained de-rating despite stable fundamentals.

thesis: Re-rating private bank trading below ICICI/HDFC on book; cheapness (positive value z) gives margin of safety.
falsification: Credit cost spike or deposit-franchise stress that stalls the catch-up vs ICICI/HDFC.

thesis: Deposit-led franchise re-accelerating after the HDFC merger digestion; a low-drama core holding.
falsification: Deposit growth stays weak / cost-of-funds keeps rising, prolonging the merger drag beyond expectations.

thesis: State Bank trades at a deep discount to private peers with improving return ratios; value re-rating candidate.
falsification: PSU-bank credit cycle turns (rising NPAs) or a capital-raise overhang; value stays a value trap.

thesis: Consolidated telecom market with rising ARPU and deleveraging; durable free-cash-flow growth.
falsification: A tariff war or aggressive new-entrant pricing that reverses the ARPU climb.

thesis: Energy cash flows fund retail and digital growth; multiple value-unlock catalysts over the cycle.
falsification: Capex stays heavy with no value-unlock (no Jio/retail listing) and refining margins compress, capping returns.

thesis: Auto franchise gaining SUV share with a strong farm-equipment cushion; broad earnings momentum.
falsification: SUV market-share loss to new launches or a rural/tractor demand slump that breaks the volume story.

thesis: Fastest-scaling value-fashion + grocery retailer in India; long runway but valuation demands discipline.
falsification: Same-store-sales growth decelerates or margins compress as it scales, puncturing the premium multiple.

thesis: High-growth mid-cap IT services winning large deals; analyst revisions turning up supports near-term earnings.
falsification: A large-deal ramp-down or discretionary-spend cut in BFSI/insurance verticals that stalls revenue growth.

thesis: Leading commercial-vehicle and retail NBFC with strong rural reach; structural credit-growth play.
falsification: Asset-quality stress in the CV cycle or funding-cost pressure that compresses NBFC spreads.

thesis: Best-execution consumer NBFC with deep distribution; durable AUM compounding at scale.
falsification: AUM growth slows or credit costs rise as the consumer cycle matures, deflating the growth premium.

thesis: Regulated-return power utility with a large renewables pivot; steady earnings plus green optionality.
falsification: Renewable execution slips or regulated returns get squeezed, leaving it a low-growth bond proxy.

thesis: Upstream energy major at a low multiple with improving analyst sentiment; cash-generative dividend payer that lowers book beta.
falsification: A sharp crude-price drop or a windfall-tax/subsidy hit that crushes upstream realizations and reverses the revisions.

thesis: Diversified materials franchise with optionality in paints and B2B e-commerce; revisions turning up on the core.
falsification: Paints/B2B cash burn outpaces core earnings, or a holding-company discount widens, capping value realization.

thesis: Dominant gold-loan lender benefiting from high gold prices and steady spreads; defensive growth that diversifies the financials sleeve.
falsification: A sharp gold-price correction shrinks loan-to-value headroom and AUM, or regulatory caps on gold-loan LTV hit growth.

thesis: Dominant life insurer trading at a deep embedded-value discount with improving VNB mix; revisions turning supportive.
falsification: VNB margin or persistency deteriorates, or the EV discount fails to close — a value trap rather than a re-rating.

thesis: Top private life insurer growing VNB with strong persistency and a low-cost SBI distribution moat.
falsification: Margin compression from product-mix shift to ULIPs or a slowdown in protection that breaks VNB growth.

thesis: Largest Indian pharma with a growing specialty/global-generics franchise; steady defensive earnings.
falsification: Specialty-pipeline setbacks or US generic price erosion that stalls the earnings-growth premium.

thesis: Leading retail-led real-estate platform riding premium-consumption and rental-income growth.
falsification: Mall footfall/consumption slows or new-asset ramp disappoints, denting rental-income compounding.

thesis: Tier-1 IT services with strong cash conversion and dividends; cyclical trough offers a reasonable entry.
falsification: Discretionary IT-spend cuts persist and deal wins fade, extending the growth slowdown.

thesis: Dominant platform in food delivery and quick commerce with improving unit economics; long consumption runway.
falsification: Quick-commerce competition reignites a cash burn or take-rates compress, pushing profitability out again.

thesis: Integrated aluminium player with Novelis downstream; cheap on value with commodity-cycle leverage.
falsification: Aluminium/LME prices roll over or Novelis spreads compress, hitting the commodity-cyclical earnings.

thesis: High-growth SFB transitioning toward universal banking with strong deposit franchise.
falsification: Asset-quality slippage in unsecured/microfinance or NIM compression as it scales down-yield.

thesis: Margin-recovery and telecom-vertical turnaround in a mid-tier IT name; self-help earnings upside.
falsification: Margin-recovery program stalls or telecom/communications vertical demand stays weak.
